untranslatable_reason: Signal requires: (1) cointegration test with 90% probability threshold — not available in indicator set; (2) hedge ratio from linear regression coefficient — requires dual-security cross-sectional calculation not supported; (3) spread construction from two securities (GLD-GDX example) — pairs trading requires custom spread calculation unavailable in single-security indicator framework. Z-score used as proxy for mean-reversion detection, but true cointegration validation and dynamic hedge ratio scaling cannot be implemented.
translation_notes: Translated as mean-reversion signal using zscore_20 as proxy for spread deviation from stationary mean. Long entry when z-score > 2 (significant positive deviation), short entry when z-score < -2 (significant negative deviation). Exit conditions approximate mean reversion at z-score ≈ 0. Actual strategy requires external cointegration testing and pairs construction not available in standard OHLCV indicator set. Parameters (lookback_period, half_life, exact threshold) remain AUTHOR_SILENT and use reasonable defaults.
